task_description: Create GagansModel_EA.mq5 - a complete MT5 Expert Advisor implementing the T-Spot trading model with HTF candle tracking, 6-pattern T-Spot detection using logarithmic midpoints, FVG-based stop loss, CISD projection targets, 5-state position management, invalidation logic, and on-chart dashboard.

verification.summary: MQL5 EA - no compiler/tests available in sandbox. Verified via structural analysis: 1402 lines, 5 input groups, all 6 T-Spot patterns implemented, LogMidpoint function with MathLog/MathExp, FVG scanning with correct 3-bar gap logic, 5-state machine (STATE_NONE through STATE_TRAILING), projection levels at 0.5/1.0/1.5/2.0/2.5, CTrade with SellLimit/BuyLimit/PositionClosePartial, CORNER_RIGHT_UPPER dashboard, proper lot normalization, invalidation checks, trailing that only moves favorably.
